rules.wrong: fill.property('ADBE Vector Fill Color').setValue([1, 1, 0.8, 1])
rules.right: fill.property('ADBE Vector Fill Color').setValue([1, 1, 0.8])
rules.error: Possible silent wrong color or type error depending on AE version.
rules.note: Shape layer fill color properties also expect 3-element RGB arrays.

shape_layers._description: Shape layer creation and property access rules

rules.title: Repeater transform property is 'ADBE Vector Repeater Pos' not 'ADBE Vector Repeater Position'
rules.wrong: rep.property('ADBE Vector Repeater Transform').property('ADBE Vector Repeater Position')

position keyframe is never set.
rules.note: The correct internal name is 'Pos', not 'Position'. Always null-guard the result.

rules.title: Always null-guard ADBE Root Vectors Group before use
rules.wrong: var root=sl.property('ADBE Root Vectors Group'); root.addProperty(...);
rules.right: var root=sl.property('ADBE Root Vectors Group'); if(!root) return JSON.stringify({success:false,message:'Shape root group not found.'});
rules.error: TypeError if root is null on certain layer types.
rules.note: Root vectors group can be null if the layer is not a shape layer.

rules.title: Null-guard addProperty() results for shape groups
rules.wrong: var grp=root.addProperty('ADBE Vector Group'); grp.name='Rect 1';
rules.right: var grp=root.addProperty('ADBE Vector Group'); if(!grp) return JSON.stringify({success:false,message:'Could not create shape group.'}); grp.name='Rect 1';

rules.title: Use 'Outer Roundness' match name for Polystar roundness, not 'Roundness'
rules.wrong: poly.property("ADBE Vector Star Roundness")
rules.right: poly.property("ADBE Vector Star Outer Roundness")
rules.error: Could not access Polystar Roundness property.
rules.note: The Polystar group exposes 'ADBE Vector Star Outer Roundness' (and 'ADBE Vector Star Inner Roundness' for stars); there is no plain 'ADBE Vector Star Roundness' match name, so property() returns null. Always verify Polystar match names: Type, Points, Position, Rotation, Inner/Outer Radius, Inner/Outer Roundness.

rules.title: Access Repeater sub-properties via the Repeater operator group, not the Transform group
rules.wrong: var repPos = shapeLayer.property("ADBE Root Vectors Group").property("ADBE Vector Transform Group").property("Repeater A Position");
rules.error: Could not access Repeater A Position.
rules.note: Repeater Position lives under the Repeater operator's own transform group ("ADBE Vector Repeater Transform" 脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗垄脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聠脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聮 "ADBE Vector Repeater Position"), not the layer's Vector Transform group. Use match names rather than display names like "Repeater A Position", which are not valid property identifiers in ExtendScript.

rules.title: Access Repeater sub-properties via the Repeater operator group, not the Transform group
rules.wrong: var repPos = shapeLayer.property("ADBE Root Vectors Group").property("ADBE Vector Transform Group").property("Repeater A Position");
rules.error: Could not access Repeater A Position.
rules.note: Repeater Position lives under the Repeater operator's own transform group ("ADBE Vector Repeater Transform" 脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗垄脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聠脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聝脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聝脙聜脗聜脙聝脗聜脙聜脗聮 "ADBE Vector Repeater Position"), not the layer's Vector Transform group. Use match names rather than display names like "Repeater A Position", which are not valid property identifiers in ExtendScript.

rules.title: Use 'ADBE Vector Repeater Position' (not 'Pos') for a Repeater's Transform position
rules.error: Could not access Repeater A Position.
rules.note: The Repeater's Transform position match name is 'ADBE Vector Repeater Position', not 'ADBE Vector Repeater Pos'; the wrong name returns null and fails the guard. Other repeater sub-properties: 'ADBE Vector Repeater Copies', 'ADBE Vector Repeater Offset', 'ADBE Vector Repeater Anchor Point', 'ADBE Vector Repeater Rotation', 'ADBE Vector Repeater Scale'.

rules.title: Use 'ADBE Vector Repeater Position' (not 'Pos') for a Repeater's Transform position
rules.error: Could not access Repeater A Position.
rules.note: The Repeater's Transform position match name is 'ADBE Vector Repeater Position', not 'ADBE Vector Repeater Pos'; the wrong name returns null and fails the guard. Other repeater sub-properties: 'ADBE Vector Repeater Copies', 'ADBE Vector Repeater Offset', 'ADBE Vector Repeater Anchor Point', 'ADBE Vector Repeater Rotation', 'ADBE Vector Repeater Scale'.

rules.title: Null-guard ADBE Text Properties and ADBE Text Document before access
rules.wrong: var srcText=tl.property('ADBE Text Properties').property('ADBE Text Document');
rules.right: var txtProps=tl.property('ADBE Text Properties'); if(!txtProps) return JSON.stringify({success:false,message:'Text properties not found.'}); var srcText=txtProps.property('ADBE Text Document'); if(!srcText) return JSON.stringify({success:false,message:'Source text not found.'});
rules.error: TypeError on non-text layers or if property chain returns null.
rules.note: Chain each property access separately with a null check.

rules.title: Null-guard ADBE Transform Group before accessing sub-properties
rules.wrong: layer.property('ADBE Transform Group').property('ADBE Position').setValue([960,540]);
rules.right: var tr=layer.property('ADBE Transform Group'); if(!tr) return JSON.stringify({success:false,message:'Transform group not found.'}); var pos=tr.property('ADBE Position'); if(pos) pos.setValue([960,540]);
rules.error: TypeError if transform group is null (e.g. on certain effect layers).
rules.note: Never chain .property() calls without null checks between them.

rules.title: Null-guard ADBE Effect Parade and individual effects before access
rules.wrong: var pw=layer.property('ADBE Effect Parade').property('CC Particle World');
rules.right: var fx=layer.property('ADBE Effect Parade'); var pw=fx ? fx.property('CC Particle World') : null; if(!pw) return;
rules.error: TypeError if effect is not applied or plugin not installed.
rules.note: Effects can be missing due to plugins not installed or wrong layer type. Never assume an effect exists.

rules.title: Check canAddProperty() before adding effects that require plugins
rules.wrong: fx.addProperty('CC Particle Systems II');
rules.right: if(fx.canAddProperty && !fx.canAddProperty('CC Particle Systems II')) return JSON.stringify({success:false,message:'CC Particle Systems II is not installed.'}); var particleEffect=fx.addProperty('CC Particle Systems II');
rules.error: Silent failure or crash if plugin not installed.
rules.note: Always gate plugin-dependent effects with canAddProperty().

rules.title: Use correct match name ADBE Ramp to add the Gradient Ramp effect
rules.wrong: var ramp = fx.addProperty("ADBE Gradient Ramp");
rules.right: var ramp = layer.property("ADBE Effect Parade").addProperty("ADBE Ramp");
rules.error: After Effects error: Can not add a property with name ADBE Gradient Ramp to this PropertyGroup.
rules.note: The Gradient Ramp effect internal match name is ADBE Ramp, not ADBE Gradient Ramp. Access its sub-properties by index (1=Start of Ramp, 2=Start Color, 3=End of Ramp, 4=End Color) to avoid version/locale mismatches.

rules.title: Use the correct match name when adding the Gradient Ramp effect
rules.wrong: layer.property("ADBE Effect Parade").addProperty("ADBE Gradient Ramp");
rules.right: layer.property("ADBE Effect Parade").addProperty("ADBE Ramp");
rules.error: After Effects error: Can not add a property with name 脙聝脗垄脙聜脗聙脙聜脗聹ADBE Gradient Ramp脙聝脗垄脙聜脗聙脙聜脗聺 to this PropertyGroup.
rules.note: The Gradient Ramp effect's internal match name is "ADBE Ramp", not "ADBE Gradient Ramp"; addProperty must receive the exact match name or it throws. Always verify match names against the AE match name reference rather than guessing from the UI display name.

rules.title: Use the correct match name when adding the Gradient Ramp effect
rules.wrong: layer.property("ADBE Effect Parade").addProperty("ADBE Gradient Ramp");
rules.right: layer.property("ADBE Effect Parade").addProperty("ADBE Ramp");
rules.error: After Effects error: Can not add a property with name 脙垄脗聙脗聹ADBE Gradient Ramp脙垄脗聙脗聺 to this PropertyGroup.
rules.note: The Gradient Ramp effect's internal match name is "ADBE Ramp", not "ADBE Gradient Ramp"; addProperty must receive the exact match name or it throws. Always verify match names against the AE match name reference rather than guessing from the UI display name.

null_guards._description: General null-guard patterns for AE property access

rules.title: Use null-guards not try/catch for property access
rules.wrong: var prop=null; try{prop=layer.property('Effects').property('Blur').property('Blurriness');}catch(e){}
rules.right: var fx=layer.property('ADBE Effect Parade'); var blur=fx ? fx.property('Blur') : null; var prop=blur ? blur.property('Blurriness') : null; if(prop) prop.setValue(20);

rules.title: Create a composition instead of bailing when no comp is active
rules.error: No active composition found. Please create a new composition (e.g., 1920x1080, 24fps), open it, and try again!
rules.note: When the user asks to build a scene (e.g. 'desert with dunes') the script must create its own composition via app.project.items.addComp() rather than refusing. Only return an error if app.project itself is null; otherwise always ensure a CompItem exists to work in.

rules.note: When the user asks to build a scene (e.g. 'desert with dunes') the script must create its own composition via app.project.items.addComp() rather than refusing. Only return an error if app.project itself is null; otherwise always ensure a CompItem exists to work in.

rules.title: Never use markdown code fences inside the generated script
rules.wrong:
/* Star Settings */```json
  var starBirthRate = 0.5;
rules.right:
/* Star Settings */
  var starBirthRate = 0.5;
rules.error: Markdown backticks inside the code string break JSON.parse() on the response envelope, causing the raw JSON to be displayed instead of the rendered script.
rules.note: The code value in the response JSON must be pure JavaScript. No backticks, no markdown fences, no language tags.

rules.title: Always close the IIFE and return a final JSON string as the last evaluated expression
rules.error: Script returned no result. Make sure After Effects is open.
rules.note: The script was truncated mid-string so the IIFE was never closed or invoked, leaving no final evaluated value for the host to read. In ES3 there is no last-statement implicit return, so every code path must explicitly return a complete, properly quoted JSON string and the wrapper must end with `})();`.

rules.title: Never break a JS string literal across lines with a backslash-newline; close strings and return a complete result
rules.wrong: return JSON.stringify({success:false,message:"No project open.\
rules.right: return JSON.stringify({success:false, message:"No project open."});
rules.error: Script returned no result. Make sure After Effects is open.
rules.note: In ES3 a string literal must be terminated on the same logical line; a trailing backslash before a newline (or a truncated snippet) produces a syntax error so the IIFE never returns a value, which AE reports as 'Script returned no result.' Always close every string and return a fully-formed JSON.stringify result.

rules.title: Always close the IIFE and return a serialized result string
rules.error: Script returned no result. Make sure After Effects is open.
rules.note: The script was truncated mid-string (unterminated string literal and unclosed IIFE), so AE evaluated nothing and got no return value. Ensure every generated script is syntactically complete: terminate all string literals, close all braces/parens, and end the IIFE with })(); so its last evaluated expression returns a JSON string.

rules.title: Top-level IIFE must always return a string result so the host receives output
rules.error: Script returned no result. Make sure After Effects is open.
rules.note: ExtendScript returns the value of the last evaluated expression; a self-invoked function's internal return value is discarded by the host. Assign the JSON string to an outer variable and put that variable as the final statement so a string is always returned on every code path, including catch.
